source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for sharp product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, strong display hierarchy, compact body text, and clear numeric dashboards.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px radii, black wing-vein dividers, blue-band active rails, pale edge-spot badges, dense dashboard panels, and restrained motif texture.

prompts.label: Transparent Blue Admiral motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated Blue Admiral butterfly (Kaniska canace inspired) wing/body motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A complete Blue Admiral butterfly with dark black-brown wings, a vivid cool blue band across the wings, small pale edge spots, subtle leaf-green rainforest-edge reflected tones in the dark wing sheen, accurate butterfly anatomy, crisp antennae, slim body, natural wing-scale texture, and a clean recognizable silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show both open wings, body, antennae, and wing edges without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves black wing structure, saturated blue band, pale spots, leaf-green undertone, and fine wing-scale texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no flowers, no leaves as objects, no landscape, no second insect, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Blue Admiral" / "Blue Admiral Butterfly", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme.
Input image: Use the visible transparent Blue Admiral butterfly motif as the source reference for palette, texture, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide. Keep all labels large and readable.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system board, precise grid, realistic UI mockup, work-focused SaaS interface language, all cards and controls using 8px radius.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: blue admiral electric wing blue, blue-band cyan, deep black wing, warm black-brown wing shadow, pale edge spot ivory, rainforest leaf green reflection, muted moss green, and soft wing-paper neutral derived from pale spots. No unrelated colors.
Visual language: black wing vein dividers, blue band active states, leaf-green success/support indicators, pale spot badges, dark scalloped wing-edge texture as subtle pattern, crisp borders and restrained shadows.
Typography: show English product UI type guidance and Japanese typography examples; use short readable labels, not dense paragraphs.
Components to show: buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badge, alert, card, table rows, command/search overlay, sidebar/top navigation, dashboard charts, empty/loading/error status states.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brands, no watermark, no tiny illegible token tables, no misspellings, no decorative landing-page hero.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Blue Admiral" / "Blue Admiral Butterfly". It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Input images: Use the visible transparent Blue Admiral butterfly motif and the visible light-mode design-system board as references. Preserve the same palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, and typography.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide. Keep all labels large and readable.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system board, precise grid, realistic UI mockup, work-focused SaaS interface language, all cards and controls using 8px radius.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors translated for dark mode: deepest wing black for background, warm black-brown and blue-black cards, electric wing blue primary, cyan blue-band highlights, pale edge-spot ivory text, leaf-green support/success, moss green muted surfaces, and restrained wing-paper neutrals.
Visual language: dark wing vein dividers, blue band active states, leaf-green success/support indicators, pale spot badges, subtle scalloped wing-edge texture, crisp borders, restrained glow-free shadows, strong but not neon contrast.
Typography: show English product UI type guidance and Japanese typography examples; use short readable labels, not dense paragraphs.
Components to show: buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badge, alert, card, table rows, command/search overlay, sidebar/top navigation, dashboard charts, empty/loading/error status states.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure-black flat background unless nuanced by wing texture, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brands, no watermark, no tiny illegible token tables, no misspellings, no decorative landing-page hero.
